io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io

Interface PacROMSetFilenames

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    PacROMSetOpener, PacROMSetSaver

    public interface PacROMSetFilenames
    An interface containing filenames for a unified Pac-Man ROM-set.

    This interface is implemented by the PacROMSetOpener and the PacROMSetSaver classes. It is used to get the filenames such as program.bin and graphic.bin, which are used when accessing or saving the entries from a unified ROM set ZIP file.

    Methods include getProgramName(), getGraphicName(), getColorName(), getPaletteName(), getSoundName(), and getMysteryName(). They are all default methods, so the classes that implement this interface don't need to fill out the methods with their own code.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String colorName
      The filename for the color.bin entry.
      static java.lang.String graphicName
      The filename for the graphic.bin entry.
      static java.lang.String mysteryName
      The filename for the mystery.bin entry.
      static java.lang.String paletteName
      The filename for the palette.bin entry.
      static java.lang.String programName
      The filename for the program.bin entry.
      static java.lang.String soundName
      The filename for the sound.bin entry.

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default java.lang.String getColorName()
